Formerly: PUAF359W.

PLCY313 Advocacy in the American Political System (3 Credits) Introduces students to the creation of law through the legislative process with a special focus on the Maryland General Assembly.

Credit Only Granted for. PUAF313, PLCY313 or PUAF359C.

Formerly: PUAF359C.
